name: Lozère (France)
description: Per pale: at the hoist a blue field strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis, at the fly a gold field with four red pales.
history: The arms combine the fleurs-de-lis of France with the gold-and-red pales of the historic county of Gévaudan.

features.role: per pale: blue with gold fleurs-de-lis and gold with red pales of Gevaudan
